Privacy Policy.select: div[data-cc="section"] h2, div[data-cc="section"] p.script, div[data-cc="section"] div.module.content
Privacy Policy.remove: header#header, nav.navigation, footer#footer, div.teaser.hero, div[data-cc="section"] a.button, div[data-cc="section"] p.btn-wrapper, div[data-cc="section"] span[data-cc="expand"]
